feed.title: Theoretical Linguistics - An Open Peer Review Journal
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Theoretical Linguistics - An Open Peer Review Journal (De Gruyter)

entry.title: The grammar of self-talk. What different modes of talking reveal about language
entry.summary: Authors: Martina Wiltschko DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tl-2024-2024 Pages: Page range: 167-229

entry.title: Is this the grammar that people use when they talk to themselves?
entry.summary: Authors: Thomas M. Brinthaupt DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tl-2025-2009 Pages: Page range: 231-237

entry.title: On the grammar and pragmatics of self-talk
entry.summary: Authors: Bart Geurts DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tl-2025-2010 Pages: Page range: 239-244

entry.title: Mapping the pragmatic field: in how many ways?
entry.summary: Authors: Virginia Hill DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tl-2025-2011 Pages: Page range: 245-252

entry.title: Expressing my feelings, not yours
entry.summary: Authors: Anders Holmberg DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tl-2025-2012 Pages: Page range: 253-258

entry.title: Facets of self-talk andde sethought
entry.summary: Authors: Kasia M. Jaszczolt DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tl-2025-2013 Pages: Page range: 259-282

entry.title: Inner speech and self-talk. A comparison
entry.summary: Authors: Nikola Anna Kompa DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tl-2025-2014 Pages: Page range: 283-290

entry.title: Self-talk and syntactic structure
entry.summary: Authors: Manfred Krifka DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tl-2025-2015 Pages: Page range: 291-307
